PASS .tmp/coupons/coupon-service.test.ts
  CouponService.applyCoupon
    ✓ AC1: valid SAVE10 applies 10% off — cartTotal * 0.90
    ✓ AC2: expired coupon throws CouponError with code COUPON_EXPIRED (5 ms)
    ✓ AC3: unknown coupon code throws CouponError with code COUPON_NOT_FOUND (1 ms)
    ✓ AC4: cartTotal $40 below minimumOrder $50 throws CouponError with code ORDER_MINIMUM_NOT_MET
    ✓ AC5: single-use coupon already used throws CouponError with code COUPON_ALREADY_USED
    ✓ AC1 (fractional): SAVE10 on $55.50 → $49.95
    ✓ AC4 (boundary): cartTotal exactly at minimumOrder ($50) should succeed and apply discount (1 ms)
    ✓ AC5 (inverse): single-use coupon not yet used succeeds
    ✓ non-single-use coupon with used=true still applies (used flag only matters for singleUse coupons)

Tests:       9 passed, 9 total
